session.user: Run `uv run ruff check src/ packages/ tests/unit/cli/test_graphite_command.py tests/unit/cli/test_help_formatter.py tests/unit/cli/test_navigation_helpers.py` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report all remaining errors. Do NOT run --fix.

tool_use.name: Bash
